description_long: This object is a small cylindrical container with a ribbed, screw-on cap, likely made of plastic, sitting atop a wide, flat, circular base. The container features a printed label with partially visible text and a faint logo, suggesting it is a branded product. The label wraps around the body of the container, with some colored elements and hazard symbols visible, indicating it may contain a chemical or cosmetic product. The cap is textured for grip, and the body appears semi-opaque, hinting at the contents inside. The base is much wider than the container itself, possibly serving as a display or protective platform. The overall color palette is muted, dominated by shades of gray and off-white, with some subtle colored accents on the label.
description: A small, cylindrical lotion container with a ribbed screw-on cap and a wide, flat base, featuring a printed label with subtle graphics and muted colors.
description_view_0: The front view shows the container's label with a visible logo and text, and the ribbed cap is clearly seen atop the cylindrical body.
description_view_1: This view highlights the label's text and symbols more directly, with the cap and base both fully visible.
description_view_2: The side view reveals the cylindrical shape and the even width of the base, with less label detail visible.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back of the label, with less branding and more plain surface, and the cap's ribbing is still visible.
